mined_facts.MDT (after 6 week: Decision: Colonoscopy: polypoidal lesion in the low rectum, biopsy adenocarcinoma, poorly differentiated.   MRI 4/3/25 – low rectal lesion with a low signal stalk, area of ulceration noted. Some high signal change consistent with mucus. Soft tissue extends to ISP so low rectal cancer plane is unsafe. T3c, N1c, CRM/ISP unsafe, EMVI positive, PSW clear
